events.text: 柴火创客空间成立
events.en: Chaihuo Makerspace was officially founded.

events.text: 将 Maker Faire 引入中国，首站落地深圳
events.en: Brought Maker Faire to China and hosted the first in Shenzhen.

events.text: 迁址华侨城创意园，社区更跨界
events.en: Relocated to OCT-LOFT, fostering a more interdisciplinary community.

events.text: 创始人潘昊荣登《福布斯》杂志封面
events.en: Founder Eric Pan appeared on the cover of Forbes magazine.

events.text: 深圳 Maker Faire 升级为 Featured 级别，成为全球第 7 个最大级别活动
events.en: Maker Faire Shenzhen upgraded to a "Featured" event, the 7th largest globally.

events.text: 两院院士路甬祥到访柴火创客空间
events.en: Lu Yongxiang, academician, visited Chaihuo MakerSpace.

events.text: 国务院总理李克强到访柴火，并成为空间荣誉会员
events.en: Premier Li Keqiang visited Chaihuo and became an honorary member.

events.text: 柴火入选成为国际级众创空间
events.en: Chaihuo was recognized as a national-level maker space.

events.text: WIRED 杂志"未来城市"纪录片《深圳：硬件硅谷》拍摄
events.en: WIRED filmed "Future Cities: Shenzhen — The Silicon Valley of Hardware" at Chaihuo.

events.text: 白宫高级科技顾问 Kate Cage 到访
events.en: Kate Cage, Senior Technology Advisor at the White House, visited Chaihuo.

events.text: 柴火创客空间升级为产业对接平台，落户万科云设计公社
events.en: Transitioned into an industrial collaboration platform at Vanke Design Commune.

events.text: 天猫新零售项目合作
events.en: Partnered with Tmall on a New Retail initiative.

events.text: 华润集团智慧空间项目合作
events.en: Partnered with China Resources Group on a Smart Space project.

events.text: 柴火创客空间正式落户河北
events.en: Official Opening of Hebei Chaihuo Makerspace.

events.text: 索尼工作坊顺利举行，探控行业创新应用
events.en: Successfully hosted the Sony Workshop, exploring industrial applications.

events.text: 罗姆（ROHM）正式成为柴火创客空间社区伙伴
events.en: ROHM became an official community partner of Chaihuo.

events.text: 与 Arduino 达成官方认证中国区战略合作
events.en: Strategic partnership with Arduino as certified partner in China.

events.text: 新一代信息技术赋能计划在深圳落地
events.en: Launched the Next-Gen Information Technology Empowerment Program.

events.text: 全面升级会员体系，打造线上会员生态
events.en: Upgraded the membership system to create an online ecosystem.

events.text: 携手微软 Azure 举办物联网技术研讨会
events.en: Hosted an IoT technology seminar with Microsoft Azure.

events.text: 推出"创客马拉松"等客制方案，赋能高校"双创教育"
events.en: Introduced "Maker Hackathon" programs to empower university innovation education.

events.text: 聚焦"数字乡村"领域发起"数字乡村先锋计划"
events.en: Launched the Digital Rural Pioneer Program.

events.text: Maker Faire Shenzhen 重启回归
events.en: Maker Faire Shenzhen made its official comeback.

events.text: 携手矽递科技启动 Maker Camp in Shenzhen 项目
events.en: Launched Maker Camp in Shenzhen with Seeed Studio.

events.text: 成都柴火创客空间暨 Fab Lab Chengdu 正式开幕
events.en: Official Opening of Chengdu Chaihuo Makerspace and Fab Lab Chengdu.

events.text: 柴火基地车「普罗米修斯号」项目正式立项
events.en: Chaihuo MCV "Prometheus" project officially approved.

events.text: 完成车辆选型与核心装备采购，启动改装
events.en: Vehicle selection and core equipment procurement completed, modification started.

events.text: 车载边缘计算系统与数字加工中心安装完成
events.en: On-board edge computing system and digital fabrication center installed.

events.text: 基地车官网上线，开放在线报名通道
events.en: MCV official website launched, online registration opened.

events.text: 「普罗米修斯号」联合「深圳科技馆」首发，从深圳正式启程
events.en: Prometheus made its debut with the Shenzhen Science & Technology Museum and officially departed from Shenzhen.

events.text: 华南首站：深圳·广州·阳江
events.en: South China first leg: Shenzhen · Guangzhou · Yangjiang.

events.text: 穿越广西：玉林·南宁·柳州，走进广西科技馆与三都镇农业基地
events.en: Crossing Guangxi: Yulin · Nanning · Liuzhou — at the Guangxi Science Museum and the Sandu Town agricultural base.
